description.ko: 유동적인 유기적 전이와 생물 발광의 생명력을 강조하며 생물학적 실체의 호흡하는 삶을 심층적으로 탐구합니다.
description.en: A deep-dive into the respiratory life of a biological entity, emphasizing fluid organic transitions and bioluminescent vitality.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Cytoplasmic Rhythm.' A colossal, pulsating cellular membrane structure composed of #7FB069 emerald moss-like textures and #2D5A3D deep forest vascular filaments. The entity is suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid atmosphere, exhaling viscous #FFE66D golden bioluminescent nectar that flows like rhythmic liquid silk. Macro focus on the semi-permeable translucent walls revealing complex internal capillary systems of glowing sap. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh to capture a divine, breathing organic flow. 8k resolution.
